features: 2.Great Sipping Experience Our red disposable plastic cups with white inner wall don’t have any sharp edges. We have designed these red cups with a rolled rim at the top to provide you a comfortable sipping experience.

3.Party Cups Reusable These 12 oz vibrant red party cups are perfect for Picnics, Christmas, Garden Party, Valentine Day, Weddings, Halloween, or any other event. Make your party friends energetic by serving them soda, lemonade, slush, ice tea, juices, wine, and more in these red stripe .

4.Multipurpose Disposable Cups Our red cups are best fit for battle shot games. You can also use these plastic cups disposable to keep and serve candies, snacks, nuts, and even cocktail. Best for kids’ arts and crafts project. These plastic party cups are easily stackable in your cabinet to use over and over.
description: Product Description Coreint Plastic Cups Coreint red plastic cups come with a comfy design that make it a preferable choice for kids and adults. Our plastic pint cups are vibrant red in color from outside while white from inside. The red and white combination makes our solo cups aesthetically pleasant. Each plastic cup has a rolled rim at top for smooth touch. The material of our plastic cups disposable is BPAs free.
